description_long: This is a compact, black keyboard with a minimalist design, featuring a standard array of rectangular keys arranged in straight rows. The surface is matte and smooth, with no visible branding or keycap labels, giving it a sleek and modern appearance. The keyboard appears to be made primarily of plastic, with a low-profile build and no visible cable or wireless receiver. The sides and back are solid, with the keys slightly raised above the main body. The overall construction suggests durability and a lightweight feel, suitable for portable or desktop use. Its understated look makes it blend seamlessly into urban environments such as offices, co-working spaces, or public computer stations.
description: A compact, black, label-less keyboard with a matte finish and minimalist design. It features straight rows of rectangular keys and a sleek, modern appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full array of keys in straight rows, highlighting the keyboard's compact and low-profile design.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the slim profile and the raised keys, with the rows of keys visible from the edge.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the back row of keys and the overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the arrangement of the keys from the edge.
